applicabilityLines: Model family reference_mass_balance is declared for fit-for-purpose values: screening, benchmark, downstream_export.
Requested fit-for-purpose: screening.
Resolved substance class: missing from scenario chemical_identity.

Supported scope examples: neutral or weakly sorbing organic chemicals under screening-level multimedia assumptions; release scenarios that can be approximated as regional mass loading into air, water, soil, or sediment compartments.
Escalate or reject when scope resembles: metals and metal species requiring speciation-aware fate treatment; nanomaterials or particulate systems requiring size-resolved transport behavior.
Reference mass balance is appropriate for transparent deterministic screening workflows inside the declared Fate MCP boundary.
When not to use this MCP: explicit spatial dispersion and gradients; intermedia transfer coefficient modeling; probabilistic uncertainty propagation; transformation-product tracking.
